name: show-renewal
topic: streaming service deciding whether to renew an expensive show

rubrics: Facts should cover the cost-benefit dynamics that drive the renewal choice.
Facts should include subscriber or audience impact and the competitive position of the service.
Facts should avoid broad media-industry commentary that does not change the decision.
Every player entity should be a genuine actor with independent agency in the situation.
Each player should have at least one objective that is specific to their position in this scenario.
Do not invent players not implied by the prompt — if the prompt describes two parties, there should be two players unless a third party is clearly relevant.
